name: job-scout-extension
description: Find, save, and export job opportunities from LinkedIn content search results.

scripts.build:chrome: pnpm run build:css && wxt build -b chrome --mv3
scripts.build:firefox: pnpm run build:css && wxt build -b firefox --mv3
scripts.build:edge: pnpm run build:css && wxt build -b edge --mv3
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:css && wxt build -b chrome --mv3 && wxt build -b firefox --mv3 && wxt build -b edge --mv3
scripts.zip:chrome: pnpm run build:css && wxt zip -b chrome --mv3
scripts.zip:firefox: pnpm run build:css && wxt zip -b firefox --mv3
scripts.zip:edge: pnpm run build:css && wxt zip -b edge --mv3
scripts.zip:all: pnpm run build:css && wxt zip -b chrome --mv3 && wxt zip -b firefox --mv3 && wxt zip -b edge --mv3
